image data:image/png;base64, "**Block**\nChess playing knight Antonius Block" as Block
image data:image/png;base64, "**Death**\nThe inevitable, but perhaps\n distractible, specter of doom." as Death
materialdesignicons f048b Server
participant Services
participant DataAccess
database db

lifelinestyle Block #cornflowerblue:3:solid
<background:#gray>

entryspacing 0.8
note over Block,Death: <wordwrap:40>To save the innocent, Block must distract death by challenging him to a game of chess. Unfortunately, Death doesn't trust block not to cheat and must setup the application that they will play with. \n(Neither of them could find a board ☹️)</wordwrap>

note over Server:Death's personal cloud server



group #navy Registration #white
Block -> Server: [POST] /user\n{username, password, email}
box over Services:Registration
Server -> Services: register(username, password, email)
Services -> DataAccess: getUser(username)
DataAccess -> db: SELECT username from user
DataAccess --> Services: null
Services -> DataAccess: createUser(username, password)
DataAccess -> db: INSERT username, password, email INTO user
Services -> DataAccess: createAuth(username)
DataAccess -> db: INSERT username, authToken INTO auth
DataAccess --> Services: authToken
Services --> Server: authToken
Server --> Block: 200\n{authToken}
end



group #orange Login #white
note over Server,Services:<wordwrap:30>Logs in an existing user (returns a new authToken).
Block --> Server: [POST] /session\n{username, password}

note over Services:Service
Server -> Services:login(username, #password);
Services -> DataAccess: getUser(username)
DataAccess -> db:SELECT username from user
DataAccess --> Services: UserData()
Services -> DataAccess: CreateAuth(username)
DataAccess -> db: INSERT username authToken INTO auth
DataAccess --> Services: authToken
Services --> Server:authToken

Server --> Block: 200\n{ username, authToken },
end




group #green Logout #white
note over Server,Services:<wordwrap:30>Logs out the user represented by the authToken.
Block -> Server: [DELETE] /session\nauthToken
note over Services:Login
Server -> Services:logout(authToken)
Services -> DataAccess:deleteAuth(authToken)
DataAccess -> db: DELETE FROM auth WHERE authToken=authToken
DataAccess --> Services:
Services --> Server:
Server --> Block: 200
end



group #red List Games #white
note over Server,Services:Gives a list of all games.
Block -> Server: [GET] /game\nauthToken
note over Services: Games
Server -> Services:
Services -> DataAccess: GetUser(AuthToken)
DataAccess -> db: SELECT username FROM auth WHERE token=authToken
DataAccess -> Services: User()
Services -> DataAccess: GetGames(username)
DataAccess -> db: SELECT games FROM games WHERE name=username
DataAccess --> Services:games [Game(), ...]
Services --> Server:games [Game(), ...]
Server --> Block:200{ games : [{ gameID, whiteUsername, blackUsername, gameName }] }
end



group #purple Create Game #white
note over Server, Services:<wordwrap:30>Creates a new game.
Block -> Server: [POST] /game\nauthToken\n{gameName}



Server --> Block: 200\n{ gameId }
end



group #yellow Join Game #black
Block -> Server: [PUT] /game\nauthToken\n{PlayerColor, gameID}

note right of Server:<wordwrap:30>Verifies that the specified game exists, and, if a color is specified, adds the caller as the requested color to the game. If no color is specified the user is joined as an observer. This request is idempotent.

Server --> Block: 200
end



group #gray Clear application #white
Block -> Server: [DELETE] /db

note over Services: Administration

note over Server:<wordwrap:30>Clears the database. Removes all users, games, and authTokens.

Server --> Services:deleteAll()
Services --> DataAccess: deleteAll()
DataAccess --> db: TRUNCATE *



Server --> Block: 200\n{authToken}
end

bottomparticipants
